content.en:
"Lord Sword Feather Divine Master!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord bent down and bowed.

At the same time, the rest of the Yun family also knelt down and said, "I've seen the Sword Feather Divine Master!"

"Hei Yu, what's going on?"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord asked.

He's in the incarnation now, so he doesn't know what's going on, but something must have happened.

Otherwise, the Black Shadow Sword Master would not have been seriously injured, and he would not have crushed the distress token.

With the cultivation and combat power of the Black Shadow Sword Lord's galaxy level, it must be a strong person above the galaxy level who can hit him hard.

The Black Shadow Sword Lord's divine consciousness transmitted to the Sword Feather Divine Lord, and explained the general situation.

"Is there a cosmic god to make a move?"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord was shocked.

There are only a few cosmic gods in the domain, and apart from the universe of the four hegemon-level forces, there are only a few cosmic gods who live in seclusion.

As a new cosmic god, the Sword Feather Divine Lord was also afraid of offending the powerful cosmic god, so he asked, "I don't know which god master Your Excellency is, can you see it?"

The other side.

Yun Chen was really stunned, he just asked for help, and how could the battle of the Yun family at this level be involved with the God of the Universe.

What surprised him even more was that Ye Tian actually had a cosmic god on his side, and he defeated the Sword Feather God Lord in an instant.

"My guess is right, at that time, the aftermath of the attack of Jin Chen Zhenjun and Yun Zhen Great Elder suddenly disappeared, and it was not the galaxy-level shot, but the cosmic god's shot. Yunchen thought.

A cosmic god would secretly protect Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!

A cosmic god, one of the top ten guards, appeared and stood next to Ye Tian.

After asking Ye Tian, he began to say: "Sword Feather Divine Lord, I am the Desperate Divine Lord of the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, and now I am one of the guards of His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws!"

"What, the cosmic god of the supreme hall of the human race!

The Sword Feather Divine Lord was shocked.

If it was just the cosmic god of the supreme hall of the human race, although he was surprised, he would not be too afraid, after all, the cosmic god is also divided into strength and status, and the cosmic god who is not the supreme hall of the human race is very noble.

But such a cosmic god turned out to be the guard of His Highness Wanfa, which is too shocking!

He didn't doubt the words of the Desperate God Lord, after all, there was no need for a strong person at the cosmic god level to say this on purpose, after all, the cosmic god was a god-level guard, if it was fake, which cosmic god would arrange himself like this?

Then there is only one possibility!

It's true!

Although the Sword Feather Divine Lord didn't know much about His Highness in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, he also knew very well how could an ordinary Highness have a cosmic god guard, and he remembered that some great god-level highnesses only had a galaxy-level guard!

Moreover, many of His Highnesses' achievements in their lives are only at the level of the stars, and it is very rare for His Highnesses to become the gods of the universe.

His former limit was the nine-star peerless Tianjiao, and he failed to become a child of the universe, but now his achievements have surpassed many children of the universe.

Therefore, he knew the situation of the children of the universe in the past dynasties of the Domain, how could he have such noble treatment.

"His Highness Wanfa is definitely not an ordinary Highness!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord thought to himself.

At this moment, he really wanted to leave, but as a cosmic god, if he left like this, it would be too embarrassing!

Then.

The Desperate Divine Lord said again: "Sword Feather Divine Lord, I advise you to apologize to Your Highness, Your Highness is not something you can offend." Otherwise, His Highness will be angry with the Sword Emperor Sect, and a word can make the Sword Emperor Sect annihilated!"

"Hmph, Desperate Divine Lord, you must have underestimated our Sword Emperor Sect too much, although you are a cosmic god, your aura is not very strong, and you may not be my opponent!"

Then.

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a guard appeared.

Two of you!

Three!

Four!

......

With the appearance of one cosmic god after another, the expression of the Sword Feather Divine Lord changed greatly.

In the blink of an eye, the nine cosmic gods stood behind Ye Tian.

There is also a cosmic god staying in Shaluo Star, otherwise there will be ten cosmic gods here.

"Sword Feather Divine Master, I don't want to waste too much time here, originally I didn't want to deal with the Sword Emperor Sect, but if you insist on protecting the Yun family, then I'm sorry, I'm not something you can offend!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

The momentum of the Nine Cosmic Gods surged towards the Yun family like a tsunami, and everyone in the Yun family was terrified.

Not to mention that the Sword Feather Divine Lord only came as an incarnation, even if it was a true body, he would never dare to deal with the nine cosmic gods at the same time!

"Nine cosmic gods, and the entire domain is at most nine cosmic gods! What is the origin of His Highness Wanfa, could it be the illegitimate son of a certain big man?"

It's no wonder that the Sword Feather Divine Lord thinks so, it's true that all of this is beyond the conceptual scope of the Sword Feather Divine Lord.

"Hei You, go back to the Sword Emperor Sect!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord gave the order.

In an instant, he automatically caused the avatar to dissipate.

"Yes!"

The Black Shadow Sword Lord dragged his seriously injured body and crushed another treasure, which instantly turned into light and flew towards the Sword Emperor Sect.

"No, Sword Feather Divine Lord, Black Shadow Sword Lord, save our Yun family!"

Allah cries out in the rain.

Unfortunately, they couldn't hear it.

At this time, he hated the Black Phantom Sword Lord extremely much.

If it weren't for the Black Shadow Sword Lord, he might have confessed it, after all, he didn't want to offend a town envoy, but the Black Shadow Sword Lord said that the Sword Emperor Sect, who had been promoted to a hegemon-level force, supported him.

As a result, now he confessed and fled, but the black cauldron could only be carried by the Panyun Xingyun family.

"Your Highness Wanfa, I know that I am wrong, let our Yun family go, our Yun family is willing to give up the status of the Lord family and let the Shaluo Xingyun family be the master family!" said Allah Rain.

The other elders of the Yun family also knelt down one after another, begging Ye Tian to spare them.

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, his hatred with the Panyun Xingyun family had not yet reached the point of extermination, and besides, he didn't want to directly destroy the Yun family, that would be too cruel.

Yun Chen and Yun Xi came to him for help, but they just asked him to get rid of the Yun family's predicament, and they didn't let the Yun family be destroyed.

However, if he leaves like this, the Sha Luoyun family will still be suppressed by the Panyun Xingyun family sooner or later.

Moreover, this time the Yun family did anger him, he moved out of the identity of the envoy of the town, and the Yun family did not compromise.

Therefore, the Panyun Nebula family must be punished.

"Desperate God Lord, seal Panyun Star for me, I can't unseal it for millions of years!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The Killer God answered.

Then, the Desperate God Lord struck.

Under the great power of the cosmic god, Allah and others could not control their bodies one by one, and flew upside down.

"No, Your Highness Wanfa, you can't seal our Panyun Xingyun family for millions of years!

No matter how Allah and the others begged for mercy, and even said that they would hand over all the family property, Ye Tian was still indifferent.

Many powerhouses of the Yun family were all sent back to Panyun Star, and then the power of the cosmic god was blessed on Panyun Star layer by layer, sealing Panyun Star in the depths of the void.

In the blink of an eye, Pan Yunxing disappeared.

As long as the cosmic god does not make a move, Panyun Star will only appear in a million years.

Millions of years is a long time, and the resources of Panyun Star are limited, in the case of not being able to obtain other resources, after a million years, the older generation of the Yun family has almost reached the limit of their lifespan and died one by one, and the new generation has no resources and cannot improve their strength at all.

Therefore, even if the Yun family still exists after a million years, it can only be a small family, and it will not be able to compete with the Shaluo Xingyun family at all.

"Yun Lao, are you satisfied with my arrangement?"

Ye Tian looked at Yunchen.

Yunchen hurriedly bent down and hugged his fists and said: "His Highness Wanfa can call me Yunchen, no matter how His Highness arranges, Yunchen is very satisfied!"

"Well, the Panyun Xingyun family has been sealed, presumably there will be no danger to you now, I want to go back!"

Then, Ye Tian left in his own spaceship and quickly disappeared from Yunchen's sight.

"Yunxi, let's go home too!"

Yunchen took Yun Xi out of the Panyun Galaxy and returned to the Sharo Galaxy.

......

Sword Emperor Sect.

The Sword Feather Divine Lord had been greatly humiliated in the Panyun Galaxy, and he was angry again and again in the Sword Emperor Sect, and he couldn't dare to disturb the Sword Emperor Sect at all.

Not long after, the fact that the Sword Feather God Lord had become a cosmic god was still publicized, and the Sword Emperor Sect was officially among the overlord-level forces.

this day.

The leaders of the four overlord-level forces came to the Sword Emperor Sect one after another to celebrate the Sword Emperor Sect becoming the fifth overlord-level force in the domain.

And the five cosmic gods were also sitting in a large hall, chatting.

Suddenly.

The Undead Army Lord spoke: "According to the information of our Undead Legion, did the Sword Feather Divine Lord provoke His Highness Wanfa not long ago?"

"Yes!" the Sword Feather Divine Lord nodded expressionlessly.

"Sword Feather Divine Lord, I have to say, you are so bold that even His Highness Wanfa dares to provoke!" The Immortal Army Lord looked at the Sword Feather Divine Lord meaningfully, and said: "Do you know the current status of His Highness Wanfa, not to mention that you have just been promoted to a cosmic god, it is nothing at the cosmic god level, even if you are at the top level of the cosmic god, you can't provoke His Highness Wanfa!"

The Sword Feather Divine Lord was taken aback, and hurriedly asked, "Immortal Army Master, do you know the situation of His Highness Wanfa?"

"Of course I know!" the undead army lord nodded, "We don't have many cosmic gods in the enclosure, and it is estimated that His Highness Wanfa will not stay in the enclosure in the future, so I don't want to have one less cosmic god in the enclosure, so I'll tell you." Actually, I have acquaintances in the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, so I know about the situation of His Highness Wanfa. His Highness Wanfa's status is very high, and his contribution to the human race is far beyond your imagination!"

"Let's put it this way, His Highness Wanfa has ten cosmic god guards, and there is also a master-level guard!"

As soon as the undead army lord's voice fell, the Sword Feather God Lord was shocked: "Impossible, the master-level powerhouse is the high-level of our human race, how can he become the guard of His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws!"

He didn't believe it!

The undead army lord said again: "At first, I didn't believe it either, but it's a fact!"
